Hello, I'm

TJ Zhang

Tech Stack

01

Experiences

My professional journey and the places I've learned and grown

Designed and developed high-performance database connectors enabling seamless integration across multiple data sources, reducing data retrieval latency and improving system interoperability for enterprise applications.

  • Created and maintained an open-source, multi-language wrapper client for Redis/Amazon Valkey, streamlining database interactions and reducing integration time for developers
  • Built high-performance Rust interfaces for Redis-like database services and unified client-facing APIs across 4+ programming languages, ensuring consistent developer experience
  • Optimized data pipelines and workflows to achieve high availability and reliability in production data systems
  • Authored comprehensive technical documentation for APIs, design patterns, and best practices, supporting both internal teams and external open-source contributors

Developed an Android and HarmonyOS service distributing application client with features including service subscription, service exploring and promoted displays.

  • Designed and implemented a SDK for application service messaging, integrated by third-party apps/services, enabling messaging & notifying through the main app as a messaging server, in multiple scenarios including order placement, parcel tracking, article subscription, etc.
  • Designed and implemented a database system for the service distributing application that allows the fast retrieving and displaying of saved app data
  • Integrated advertisement and app traffic monitoring feature into different modules of the application and achieved commercial exposure for third party advertisers
  • Implemented dynamically controllable front-page display which improved exposure for promoted services by pushing up the display order of selected pages
